events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established when U.S. Ambassador to Australia Marshall Green presented credentials to Nauru, remaining resident at Canberra.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on October 24, 1976, when U.S. Ambassador to Australia Marshall Green presented his credentials to Nauru; he remained resident at Canberra.

events.event_description: Accreditation of U.S. Ambassador to Nauru changed from Canberra to Suva; U.S. Ambassador to Fiji Don L. Gevirtz presented credentials, remaining resident at Suva.

evidence.quote: On April 24, 1996, U.S. Ambassador to Fiji Don L. Gevirtz presented his credentials; he remained resident at Suva.
